titel: Activities within the Council of Europe's Committee of Ministers for the entire year 2024 and the first half of 2025.
html: In this document, the government provides an overview of its activities within the Council of Europe's Committee of Ministers, and other related areas, for the entire year of 2024 and the first half of 2025.
tldr: The Swedish government outlines what Sweden has done and plans to do within the Council of Europe's Committee of Ministers during 2024 and the beginning of 2025.
lattlast:
The government has published a document outlining its work within a group called the Committee of Ministers of the Council of Europe. This group is part of the Council of Europe, an organization that works to protect human rights and democracy in Europe.

The document covers the entire year of 2024 and the first half of 2025. It aims to provide an overview of what has happened and what is planned to happen during this period.

By publishing this report, the government is demonstrating how Sweden participates in the important work carried out by this international group.
